title: draft_report_metadata.json -- draft report generation record v0.1
description: Produced by draft-report, once per version (v1 in Phase 1, v2 in Phase 2). Lean by design: the actual citations already live in draft_report_v{n}.evidence.json (the document-assembly sidecar) and pipeline-progression status (has critic run, has human reviewed) already lives in _run_state.json / human_input_status -- this file does not duplicate either, it just records what was generated and from what.

template_id.description: From case_type_result.json. Structure defined in templates/draft-report.md (배상책임_후유장해형 / 진단수술비형; 실손형/기타형 still TODO -- see open-decisions.md #2).

source_refs.description: Which upstream contract files this version was generated from. e.g. ["screening_report.json", "case_type_result.json"] for v1, ["draft_report_v1.md", "rebuttal_points.json"] for v2.
